text: Hi, my name is Sandy and I'm with AutoCare. Based on what we're seeing in your area, you may be overpaying for your auto insurance. And we want to help you find a better rate. Just to make sure we're finding either right quote, may I ask how old you are? Old enough it still gets hard. Or maybe I shouldn't say it's young enough. You do currently have active auto insurance on your vehicle, correct? Well, I've got an active sector. You want to try it out? Great. I will now transfer you to a specialist to discuss your premium savings options. Hold just a moment. Are you still with me? I'm here. My name is Jacob. I'm from AutoCare. How are you? Well, good for you.
